description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/bff/rn with a cache keyed by $CACHE_KEY that stores /root/.cargo. Define a single stage named test. Add a release_build job in the test stage that runs only on tags and the master branch, executes the commands: rustup update, cargo build --release, mkdir -p bin/linux_x64, cp target/release/rn bin/linux_x64/rn, cp rn.sh bin/, and publishes the bin/ directory as an artifact named rn. Also add a unit_test job in the test stage that runs rustup update and ./kcov.sh.
